name: Ethereum Foundation — Ecosystem Support Program
notes: Quarterly allocations often $7M–$14M total. Large checks for clients/ZK/security/research-grade data.

name: Solana Foundation — Public Goods / Open Source
notes: Public-goods average check historically cited around ~$40k.

name: Arbitrum Foundation Grant Program
notes: Typical builder grants ~$20k–$150k in ARB; separate from mega incentive programs.

name: Avalanche Retro9000
notes: Up to $40M pool; usage/burn based rounds; lifetime caps may apply.

name: Optimism Retro Funding — Dev Tooling
notes: Rewards OSS toolchain. Source: ethereum-optimism/Retro-Funding (not Agora). S7/M6: ~93 rewarded, median≈7772 OP, max=78000 OP. Register on OP Atlas.

name: Optimism Retro Funding — Onchain Builders
notes: Onchain Superchain growth. Source: Retro-Funding JSON. S7/M6: median≈3194 OP among rewarded, max=65000 OP. Needs verified contracts on eligible OP chains.
